_note: Standalone pool hall example. 12000x6000mm hall with single rectangular pool 10000x5000mm. Adjacent 4000x3000mm changing room shares the SOUTH wall (y=0). Pool zone_2 extends 2m horizontally and 1.5m above water level — reaches within 200mm of the changing-room boundary, triggering reviewer D-2 flag per BS 7671:2018 §702.55.4. Pool main equipotential bonding ≥10mm² per §702.415.1.

anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Pool basin extracted from architect Rev-D plan dated 2026-05-20; rectangular 10x5m pool; basin floor 1800mm below pool deck level; water surface at 200mm above pool deck per architect's hydraulic schedule.
